ocr.text: The dynamics of myosin motor proteins play a critical role in various cellular processes, and understanding their kinetics is
essential for elucidating their functional mechanisms. The data presented in Table 1 specifically focuses on the myosin motor
protein Myo5c-S1, highlighting the effects of ADP dissociation and the influence of deac-aminoADP on myosin activity.
Notably, the "Fast rate (s−1)" and "Slow rate (s−1)" columns provide valuable insights into the rates of ATP hydrolysis and the

corresponding mechanical movement of the myosin motor. 

The observed fast rate of 14.3 ± 0.3 s−1 indicates a robust ATP
turnover, which is crucial for the efficient translocation of cargo within cellular structures.
Myosin  Monitoring  Chasing with  Fast rate (s−1)  Slow rate (s−1)
Myo5c-S1  ADP dissociation  Deac-aminoADP  14.3 ± 0.3  N/A
Myo5c-S1  Deac-aminoADP dissociation  ADP  1.25 ± 0.21  N/A
Myo5c-HMM  ADP dissociation  Deac-aminoADP  5.5 ± 0.2  0.028 ± 0.009
Myo5c-HMM  Deac-aminoADP dissociation  ADP  0.31 ± 0.02  0.0086 ± 0.0021
Myo5c-HMM  ADP dissociation  Deac-aminoATP  3.9 ± 0.4  N/A
Myo5c-HMM  Deac-aminoADP dissociation  ATP  0.29 ± 0.09  N/A
Myo5c-HMM-SNAP  ADP dissociation  Deac-aminoADP  5.8 ± 0.2  0.021 ± 0.01
Myo5c-HMM-SNAP  Deac-aminoADP dissociation  ADP  0.28 ± 0.05  0.0106 ± 0.0021
Myo5c-HMM-SNAP  ADP dissociation  Deac-aminoATP  4.2 ± 0.3  N/A
Myo5c-HMM-SNAP  Deac-aminoADP dissociation  ATP  0.21 ± 0.09  N/A
Myo5c-S1*1  mant-ADP dissociation  ATP  16 ± 0.6*1  N/A
Myo5c-S1*2  dmant-ADP dissociation  ADP  17.7 ± 0.6*2  N/A
In contrast, the monitoring of the "Chasing with" column underscores the conditions under which these rates were measured,
illuminating the interactions between myosin and its associated regulatory molecules. This data is vital for researchers aiming to
decipher the intricate behaviors of myosin under varying biochemical conditions, thus contributing to a deeper understanding of
cellular motility and the potential implications for diseases linked to myosin dysfunction. Overall, the findings presented in this
table enhance our comprehension of myosin kinetics and their physiological significance.
